text:
{
  "title": "Financial Statements Practical Examination",
   "description": "Using the information provided, prepare the required financial statement.",
   "timeLimit": 60,
   "passingScore": 70,
   "sections": [
       {
           "name": "Financial Statements",
           "title": "Financial Statements (100 Marks)",
           "description": "Prepare the required financial statements.",
           "questions": [
               {
                   "questionNumber": 1,
                   "text": "Prepare an Income Statement",
                   "type": "financial-spreadsheet",
                   "points": 20,
                   "spreadsheetTemplate": "{\"tables\":[{\"title\":\"Income Statement\",\"headers\":[\"Item\",\"Amount (RWF)\"],\"data\":[[\"Sales Revenue\",\"25000000\"],[\"Cost of Goods Sold\",\"15000000\"],[\"Gross Profit\",\"10000000\"],[\"Salaries Expense\",\"2500000\"],[\"Rent Expense\",\"1200000\"],[\"Utilities Expense\",\"300000\"],[\"Interest Expense\",\"200000\"],[\"Net Profit\",\"5800000\"]]}]}",
                   "spreadsheetModelAnswer": "{\"tables\":[{\"title\":\"Income Statement\",\"headers\":[\"Item\",\"Amount (RWF)\"],\"data\":[[\"Sales Revenue\",\"25000000\"],[\"Cost of Goods Sold\",\"15000000\"],[\"Gross Profit\",\"10000000\"],[\"Salaries Expense\",\"2500000\"],[\"Rent Expense\",\"1200000\"],[\"Utilities Expense\",\"300000\"],[\"Interest Expense\",\"200000\"],[\"Net Profit\",\"5800000\"]]}]}",
                   "correctAnswer": "Income Statement: Sales Revenue: 25000000, Cost of Goods Sold: 15000000, Gross Profit: 10000000, Salaries Expense: 2500000, Rent Expense: 1200000, Utilities Expense: 300000, Interest Expense: 200000, Net Profit: 5800000"
               },
               {
                   "questionNumber": 2,
                   "text": "Prepare a Statement of Financial Position (Balance Sheet)",
                   "type": "financial-spreadsheet",
                   "points": 20,
                   "spreadsheetTemplate": "{\"tables\":[{\"title\":\"Statement of Financial Position\",\"headers\":[\"Item\",\"Amount (RWF)\"],\"data\":[[\"Cash\",\"2000000\"],[\"Inventory\",\"1500000\"],[\"Accounts Receivable\",\"2500000\"],[\"Equipment\",\"8000000\"],[\"Accounts Payable\",\"2000000\"],[\"Bank Loan\",\"3000000\"],[\"Owner's Capital\",\"9000000\"]]}]}",
                   "spreadsheetModelAnswer": "{\"tables\":[{\"title\":\"Statement of Financial Position\",\"headers\":[\"Item\",\"Amount (RWF)\"],\"data\":[[\"Cash\",\"2000000\"],[\"Inventory\",\"1500000\"],[\"Accounts Receivable\",\"2500000\"],[\"Equipment\",\"8000000\"],[\"Accounts Payable\",\"2000000\"],[\"Bank Loan\",\"3000000\"],[\"Owner's Capital\",\"9000000\"]]}]}",
                   "correctAnswer": "Assets: Cash: 2000000, Inventory: 1500000, Accounts Receivable: 2500000, Equipment: 8000000, Total Assets: 14000000, Liabilities & Equity: Accounts Payable: 2000000, Bank Loan: 3000000, Total Liabilities: 5000000, Owner's Capital: 9000000, Total Liabilities & Equity: 14000000"
               },
               {
                   "questionNumber": 3,
                   "text": "Prepare a Cash Flow Statement (Indirect Format)",
                   "type": "financial-spreadsheet",
                   "points": 20,
                   "spreadsheetTemplate": "{\"tables\":[{\"title\":\"Cash Flow Statement\",\"headers\":[\"Item\",\"Amount (RWF)\"],\"data\":[[\"Net Profit\",\"6000000\"],[\"Depreciation\",\"800000\"],[\"Increase in Accounts Receivable\",\"400000\"],[\"Increase in Accounts Payable\",\"300000\"],[\"Purchase of Equipment\",\"2500000\"],[\"Bank Loan Received\",\"4000000\"]]}]}",
                   "spreadsheetModelAnswer": "{\"tables\":[{\"title\":\"Cash Flow Statement\",\"headers\":[\"Item\",\"Amount (RWF)\"],\"data\":[[\"Net Profit\",\"6000000\"],[\"Depreciation\",\"800000\"],[\"Increase in Accounts Receivable\",\"-400000\"],[\"Increase in Accounts Payable\",\"300000\"],[\"Purchase of Equipment\",\"-2500000\"],[\"Bank Loan Received\",\"4000000\"],[\"Net Increase in Cash\",\"8200000\"]]}]}",
                   "correctAnswer": "Operating Activities: Net Profit: 6000000, Add Depreciation: 800000, Less Increase in Accounts Receivable: -400000, Add Increase in Accounts Payable: 300000, Net Cash from Operating Activities: 6700000, Investing Activities: Purchase of Equipment: -2500000, Net Cash Used in Investing: -2500000, Financing Activities: Bank Loan Received: 4000000, Net Cash from Financing: 4000000, Summary: Net Increase in Cash: 8200000"
               },
               {
                   "questionNumber": 4,
                   "text": "Prepare a Statement of Changes in Equity",
                   "type": "financial-spreadsheet",
                   "points": 20,
                   "spreadsheetTemplate": "{\"tables\":[{\"title\":\"Statement of Changes in Equity\",\"headers\":[\"Item\",\"Amount (RWF)\"],\"data\":[[\"Opening Capital\",\"12000000\"],[\"Additional Investment\",\"2000000\"],[\"Net Profit\",\"3500000\"],[\"Drawings\",\"-1000000\"]]}]}",
                   "spreadsheetModelAnswer": "{\"tables\":[{\"title\":\"Statement of Changes in Equity\",\"headers\":[\"Item\",\"Amount (RWF)\"],\"data\":[[\"Opening Capital\",\"12000000\"],[\"Additional Investment\",\"2000000\"],[\"Net Profit\",\"3500000\"],[\"Drawings\",\"-1000000\"],[\"Closing Capital\",\"16500000\"]]}]}",
                   "correctAnswer": "Opening Capital: 12000000, Add: Additional Investment: 2000000, Add: Net Profit: 3500000, Less: Drawings: -1000000, Closing Capital: 16500000"
               },
               {
                   "questionNumber": 5,
                   "text": "Prepare Both an Income Statement and a Balance Sheet",
                   "type": "financial-spreadsheet",
                   "points": 20,
                   "spreadsheetTemplate": "{\"tables\":[{\"title\":\"Income Statement\",\"headers\":[\"Item\",\"Amount (RWF)\"],\"data\":[[\"Sales Revenue\",\"40000000\"],[\"Cost of Goods Sold\",\"24000000\"],[\"Gross Profit\",\"16000000\"],[\"Salaries Expense\",\"5000000\"],[\"Rent Expense\",\"2000000\"]]},{\"title\":\"Balance Sheet\",\"headers\":[\"Item\",\"Amount (RWF)\"],\"data\":[[\"Cash\",\"3500000\"],[\"Inventory\",\"5000000\"],[\"Equipment\",\"10000000\"],[\"Accounts Payable\",\"4000000\"],[\"Owner's Capital\",\"11500000\"]]}]}",
                   "spreadsheetModelAnswer": "{\"tables\":[{\"title\":\"Income Statement\",\"headers\":[\"Item\",\"Amount (RWF)\"],\"data\":[[\"Sales Revenue\",\"40000000\"],[\"Cost of Goods Sold\",\"24000000\"],[\"Gross Profit\",\"16000000\"],[\"Salaries Expense\",\"5000000\"],[\"Rent Expense\",\"2000000\"],[\"Net Profit\",\"9000000\"]]},{\"title\":\"Balance Sheet\",\"headers\":[\"Item\",\"Amount (RWF)\"],\"data\":[[\"Cash\",\"3500000\"],[\"Inventory\",\"5000000\"],[\"Equipment\",\"10000000\"],[\"Accounts Payable\",\"4000000\"],[\"Owner's Capital\",\"11500000\"],[\"Current Year Profit\",\"3000000\"],[\"Total Equity\",\"14500000\"]]}]}",
                   "correctAnswer": "Income Statement: Sales Revenue: 40000000, Cost of Goods Sold: 24000000, Gross Profit: 16000000, Salaries Expense: 5000000, Rent Expense: 2000000, Net Profit: 9000000, Balance Sheet: Cash: 3500000, Inventory: 5000000, Equipment: 10000000, Accounts Payable: 4000000, Owner's Capital: 11500000, Current Year Profit: 3000000, Total Equity: 14500000"
               }
           ]
       }
   ]
}
